mapper.select: SELECT A.POP_CD , A.POP_NM , A.POP_WIDTH , A.POP_HGT , A.POP_X_LOC , A.POP_Y_LOC , A.OPEN_START_DT , A.OPEN_END_DT , A.USE_YN , A.MENU_SYS_DIV , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_POP A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC

SELECT A.POP_CD , A.POP_NM , A.POP_CNTS , A.POP_WIDTH , A.POP_HGT , A.POP_X_LOC , A.POP_Y_LOC , A.OPEN_START_DT , A.OPEN_END_DT , A.USE_YN , A.MENU_SYS_DIV FROM TB_POP A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.POP_CD = #{popCd}
